text: If your flight is delayed, SunSafe covers up to $200 per day with no cap on the number of days.
subclaims: The daily cover rate is $200 per day.
There is no cap on the total number of days covered.

text: Trip cancellation is covered up to $10,000 per person for non-refundable costs.
subclaims: The cancellation limit is $10,000 per person.

text: Strike action is always covered, regardless of when it was announced.
subclaims: Strike action is covered even if announced before booking.

text: The policy covers all travel delays, even those caused by the airline's own mechanical failures.
subclaims: Delays caused by airline mechanical failures are covered.
